name: Dracula — Vintage Cinema
author: Storyplay
license: Public Domain / CC0 — see assets-sources.md for per-image attribution.

art.notes: Nosferatu (F. W. Murnau, 1922) film stills + 19th-century Romantic landscape painting + period portrait photography.

description: Atmospheric demo pack using only public-domain sources. F.W. Murnau's Nosferatu provides the visual grammar for vampires and Carpathian dread; Caspar David Friedrich landscapes set the gothic mood; period photographs portray the Victorian cast.
